title: GUILD RAID!
notif: Your dungeon has been discovered by a local Guild.

title: LEGENDARY SPEED RUNNER
notif: A high-level, legendary adventurer is trying to set a 'world record' for clearing your dungeon.

title: DUNGEON PESTILENCE
notif: A disease has broken out among your minions.

title: CARTOGRAPHER'S CONVENTION
notif: A group of scholars are on their way to map out the dungeon.

title: BLOOD MOON ECLIPSE
notif: A rare celestial event empowers the dark arts.

title: NEGOTIATION DAY
notif: The Adventurer's Guild sends a diplomat to your dungeon.

title: THE TOURNAMENT
notif: Three rivals enter — they hate each other more than they hate you.

title: RIVAL DUNGEON
notif: A rival dungeon's monsters are invading. Their boss seeks yours.

title: TWITCH CON
notif: Streamers are converging on your dungeon. Pure chaos awaits.

title: DARK DEAL
notif: A demon will appear in your boss room tonight, offering a free pact.

title: COSPLAY CONTEST
notif: Adventurers in monster costumes will visit. Most won't even fight.

title: LOOT GOBLIN HEIST
notif: A pack of Loot Goblins has broken into your treasure hoard!
